name: Products
description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. Get the ultimate view of potential with SHL’s unmatched portfolio of assessments and interview technology. Get the precise people answers you need with SHL’s products, including pioneering personality tests, behavioral and skills assessments, coding and language simulations, 360° feedback, AI-powered video interviews, and virtual assessment and development centers. SHL products have been carefully designed to produce highly reusable data and to enhance all stages of the talent experience, from scaling early-stage candidate screening to uncovering critical, data-driven insights into future employee development. We combine multimedia-rich experiences with realistic, scalable simulations and assessments to attract and engage candidates on a deeper level than ever before, and to provide your employees with valuable insights that drive performance and retention. Drive successful talent decisions with one platform of genre-defining, scientifically robust assessments and tools delivering automated, real-time, multi-purpose talent insights.

name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire (OPQ)
description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. Get accurate, Insightful assessments of potential by matching individual working preferences directly to business requirements. Gain accurate, Insightful assessment of employee potential with SHL’s Occupational Personality Questionnaire. The OPQ helps you make more informed talent decisions. Participants answer questions about their working preferences to identify their strengths and areas for development within the universal competency framework. SHL quickly and reliably matches this understanding to a scientifically chosen profile, tailored to meet your hiring or development needs.

name: Job-Focused Assessments (JFA)
description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. SHL’s Job-Focused Assessments predict job success by evaluating key hard and soft skills tailored to specific roles. Applicants take a short, engaging assessment relevant to the job and you gain a comprehensive view of candidates' role readiness, team fit and future potential. Fast and accurate measurement of job-relevant skills using patented Apta technology. Get a well-rounded view of each candidate’s level of potential, readiness, and fit through one single assessment. Job-Focused Assessments utilize Apta, a direct measure of observable competency behaviors linked to performance, which has been proven to reduce faking and impression management.

name: Motivational Questionnaire (MQ)
description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. Understand what motivates your workforce and how to activate that knowledge. SHL’s Motivational Questionnaire provides specific insights that facilitate the best talent decisions. Participants rate a series of situations or conditions, deciding how each would affect their motivation to work. SHL utilizes the insights from the MQ to match the candidate with a tailored profile, leveraging our extensive expertise and considering your hiring or development needs. The motivation assessment scores are then delivered to your teams, directly integrated within your SHL talent acquisition or management solution.

name: Situational Judgment Tests (SJT)
description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. Match candidates’ behavioral fit to your roles with a situational judgment test. These tests are typically administered early in the assessment process, they provide candidates with a fully-branded introduction to your business. Candidates complete role and culture-based brief scenarios tailored to specific roles or drawn from SHL's bank for quick deployment. Our science evaluates each candidate's behavioral fit to your role using our Universal Competency Framework , the industry’s leading assessment of behavioral competency.

name: SHL Verify
description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. Measure potential to learn, adapt, and perform in any role with SHL Verify Interactive cognitive assessments. Our pre-employment cognitive assessment starts by asking candidates a series of interactive questions organized around a central principle linked to something they are likely to encounter in the role.

name: SHL 360
description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. Identify skills, development gaps and future potential with real-time access to reusable people data. Empower individuals to drive their professional development while helping your workforce planning initiatives. Our interactive tours show the whole 360 experience. Take an interactive tour of your employee experience, from self-assessment to requesting stakeholder feedback.

name: Behavioral Assessments
description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. Boost the quality of hires for every role by assessing each candidate’s behavioral fit. SHL’s realistic job previews and situational judgement tests give candidates engaging previews of the role at hand, while helping you to sift the applicant pool for best-fit applicants at scale. Our behavioral assessments reduce the risk of assessing candidates who may not be a role or cultural fit, saving your recruitment teams time and money. SHL showcases your opportunities by packing each hiring experience with animation, interactive videos, and branded multimedia, built by you or by us to keep candidates engaged. Preview roles with scenario-based quizzes that give candidates a feel for what the job would be like before they commit to applying.

name: Personality Assessments
description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. Improve hiring with science-backed personality tests that reveal each candidate’s preferences, motivations, and remote-work capability. Align individual working preferences to business requirements, and produce accurate, fair assessments of each worker’s potential. Match each individual’s personal motivation to your team and organizational goals, so you can build an engaged, high-performing workforce. What You Need to Know About SHL’s Personality Assessments You can use the OPQ, MQ and RWQ at any stage of the candidate journey, whether you are recruiting, developing or just want to better understand your workforce.

name: Video Interviews
description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. Traditional screening methods often fall short in meeting today’s recruitment challenges. With 86% of organizations now conducting virtual interviews, businesses need reliable, scalable tools. SHL’s Smart Interview Suite offers intuitive software that simplifies the process, manages high application volumes, and empowers recruitment teams to deliver stronger hiring outcomes. SHL’s Smart Interview Professional is an end-to-end interviewing solution that guides a comprehensive, consistent interview process to ensure the right skills are measured, high-quality hiring decisions are made, and ongoing interview improvements boost hiring outcomes. Remotely and quickly meet thousands of candidates with minimal effort and consistently interview shortlisted candidates to delight and convert the best talent.

name: Skills & Simulations
description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. SHL’s market-leading portfolio provides far-ranging breadth across roles and industries. Comprehensively evaluate technical concepts, knowledge, and application, covering 200+ specific IT skills. Assess your tech candidates with AI-powered online coding simulations that measure accuracy and logical correctness, and more. Build a strong, multilingual workforce with reliable, AI-powered language assessments. Pressure-test agents for success with job simulations that emulate a real call center environment.

name: Call Center Simulations
description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. SHL reduced the hiring of agents with a First Call Rate (FCR) below an acceptable threshold for one customer by 65%. We also helped them increase CSAT score by 32% by identifying highly skilled customer service representatives. SHL Contact Center simulations are proven to help reduce time to hire by over 60%.

name: Business Skills
description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. Our world-leading portfolio of business assessment tools engages your candidates with real-world simulations and science-backed questions covering everything from personality and motivation to specific business skills. Our business assessments use simulations to measure each candidate’s proficiency in using key productivity tools across the Microsoft suite. Utilize our online computer literacy test for hiring candidates who can prove their fundamental computer skills in a simulated Microsoft Windows environment. Assess candidate’s ability to manage workbooks, analyze and format data, work across multiple tabs or spreadsheets, print correctly, and more. Assess candidate’s ability to organize and format content, manage documents, work with page illustrations and layouts, and more.

name: Coding Simulations
description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. SHL Coding Simulations help reduce false negatives by 45% and improve hiring signals across programming ability, solution logic, time complexity, and industry-accepted best practices. SHL's online coding tests allow applicants to solve real-life problems by running and testing their own source code in our IDE. The coding skills assessment scores the logic of each candidate’s code using a benchmark dataset. Teams receive scores and detailed reports, advancing capable software engineers to the next stage.

name: Technical Skills
description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. SHL technical skills assessments helps you to comprehensively evaluate knowledge of 200+ technical concepts through multiple choice questions. These include Cloud Engineering, Data Engineering, DevOps, Data Science, Machine Learning, and more. Programming simulation for machine learning, data science, and data engineering roles. Applied tests for Hadoop, Spark, Tableau, MongoDB, and more. Assess a candidate’s ability to work on front-end, backend, and database technologies such as HTML/CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, AngularJS, MySQL, PHP, and more. Tests of cloud computing, various cloud service models, virtualization, and private clouds. A compiler-integrated platform that evaluates coding skills of developers as they write, compile, and execute the code in real-time.

name: Language Evaluation
description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. Accelerate your hiring process with SHL's AI-driven suite of communication and language tests, streamlining language assessment to swiftly identify and onboard candidates who excel at customer satisfaction. Candidates undergo an assessment to demonstrate their spoken language proficiency, which can be taken via mobile, desktop, or Interactive Voice Response System [IVR]. We auto-evaluate written communication for content quality, grammar, and etiquette. Comprehensive reports are provided, containing scores, linguistic errors, and CEFR level scores for each candidate. SHL recommended candidates were 63% more likely to be high performers. Reduce candidate wait time by 55% with automated evaluation and quick feedback.

name: Outsourced Assessments (VADC)
description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. SHL’s end-to-end digital assessment and development centers are the most efficient and accurate way of identifying potential. Our team of 300 people scientists operate in 150 countries, speak over 40 languages, and provide 24-hour support. Effortlessly organize and run your centers with a digital platform that delights participants with interactive media and a clear and engaging end-to-end process. The world’s broadest range of skills, psychometric, personality, and cognitive assessments empower people to show their potential with simulations, group exercises, client meetings, and more. Increase the speed of hiring and development decisions with automated reports and dashboards powered by unrivaled people science. Reduced time-to-hire by 60% across multiple global organizations.

name: Account Manager Solution
description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. The Account Manager solution is an assessment used for job candidates applying to mid-level leadership positions that tend to manage the day-to-day operations and activities of client accounts. Sample tasks for these jobs include, but are not limited to: communicating with clients about project status, developing and maintaining project plans, coordinating internally with appropriate project personnel, and ensuring client expectations are being met. Potential job titles that use this solution are: Account Executive, Account Manager, and Senior Account Manager. There are multiple configurations of this solution available. Approximate Completion Time in minutes = 49

name: Administrative Professional - Short Form
description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. The Administrative Professional solution is for entry to mid-level positions that involve routine clerical and administrative functions in addition to office management functions and customer service. Sample tasks for this job include, but are not limited to: arranging conference calls; drafting correspondence; scheduling meetings; greeting visitors; coordinating office activities. Potential job titles that use this solution are: Administrative Assistant, Secretary, Office Manager, Administrative Aide, and Administrative Associate. Approximate Completion Time in minutes = 36

name: Agency Manager Solution
description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. The Agency Manager solution is for mid-level sales management positions that include front line management and sales responsibilities. Sample tasks for this job include, but are not limited to: directing and coordinating financial activities of workers in a branch, office, or department of an establishment, such as branch bank, brokerage firm, risk and insurance department, or credit department.  Potential job titles that use this solution are: Agency Manager, Brokerage Manager. Multiple configurations of this solution are available. Front Line Manager, Manager, Supervisor, Approximate Completion Time in minutes = 51

description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. This assessment is designed for entry-level positions appropriate for countries and industries that use an apprenticeship model. It is intended to be used multi-nationally for organisations whose business spans across regions. General Population, Graduate, Entry-Level, Approximate Completion Time in minutes = 30

description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. The Administrative Assistant solution is for entry-level clerical positions that interact with external or internal customers. Sample tasks for these jobs include, but are not limited to: answering telephones, managing files and records, sorting mail, greeting customers, and collaborating with co-workers on projects. Potential job titles that use this solution are: Receptionist and Administrative Assistant. There are multiple configurations of this solution available. Approximate Completion Time in minutes = 35

name: Bank Collections Agent - Short Form
description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. This solution is for entry-level collections positions in an inbound or outbound call center environment in a financial setting. Candidates answer multiple choice questions to measure achievement orientation, dependability, collector numerical skills, revenue recovery, customer focus, and persistence and planfulness. There are multiple configurations and versions of this solution available. Approximate Completion Time in minutes = 45 Fact Sheet Bank Collections Agent One Sitting

name: Bank Operations Supervisor - Short Form
description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. The Bank Operations Supervisor solution is for job candidates applying to entry-level leadership positions who tend to supervise hourly employees. Sample tasks for these jobs include, but are not limited to:  planning and preparing work schedules, assigning employees to specific duties; coaching  employees on attendance, conduct, schedule adherence, and work tasks, developing employees' skills ; training subordinates; prioritizing multiple tasks  and priorities; and making  day-to-day decisions with minimal guidance from others. Potential job titles that use this solution are: Team Leader, First Line Supervisor, Processing Supervisor, Call Center Supervisor, and Customer Service Supervisor. There are multiple configurations and versions of this solution available. Front Line Manager, Manager, Supervisor, Approximate Completion Time in minutes = 45

name: Bilingual Spanish Reservation Agent Solution
description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. The Bilingual Reservation Agent solution is designed for customer centered entry-level positions within the hospitality industry. Sample tasks may include making, updating, or canceling hotel reservations made in English or Spanish; listening to customers speak Spanish and entering information into a computer in English; providing information on the hotel and the services offered. Potential job titles that use this solution are: Bilingual Reservation Agent, Customer Service Representative and Reservationist. Multiple configurations of this solution are available. Approximate Completion Time in minutes = 43

name: Bookkeeping, Accounting, Auditing Clerk Short Form
description: If you choose to continue with your current browser we cannot guarantee your experience. The Bookkeeping, Accounting, and Auditing Clerk solution is for entry-level positions that involve entering numerical data into computer systems and maintaining financial records. Sample tasks for this job include, but are not limited to: entering financial data into computers; checking financial records for accuracy; perform routine computations on financial data. Potential job titles that use this solution are: Accounting Clerk, Bookkeeper, Accounting Associate, Auditing Clerk and Accounts Receivable Clerk. Approximate Completion Time in minutes = 49

name: Branch Manager - Short Form

name: Cashier Solution
